Interface RiskFreeRateMappingJpaRepository

All Superinterfaces:
BaseRepositoryCustom<RiskFreeRateMapping>, org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<RiskFreeRateMapping, Integer>, org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<RiskFreeRateMapping, Integer>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListCrudRepository<RiskFreeRateMapping, Integer>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListPagingAndSortingRepository<RiskFreeRateMapping, Integer>, org.springframework.data.repository.PagingAndSortingRepository<RiskFreeRateMapping, Integer>, org.springframework.data.repository.query.QueryByExampleExecutor<RiskFreeRateMapping>, org.springframework.data.repository.Repository<RiskFreeRateMapping, Integer>, UpdateCreateJpaRepository<RiskFreeRateMapping>
public interface RiskFreeRateMappingJpaRepository extends org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<RiskFreeRateMapping, Integer>, UpdateCreateJpaRepository<RiskFreeRateMapping>

  • Method Details

    • findByCurrency

      Optional<RiskFreeRateMapping> findByCurrency(String currency)

    • findAllRiskFreeInstruments

      @Query(nativeQuery=true) List<RiskFreeInstrumentOption> findAllRiskFreeInstruments()
      Lists ALL Security rows in the "Risk-free rate" assetclass (the one seeded by V0_35_5), including those already mapped. Used twofold by the admin UI: the dropdown options for the instrument-picker column AND the lookup table used to render the security's display name (column 2) and FRED series id (column 3) for already-mapped rows.

      Per-row "already-used" filtering is done client-side in optionsProviderFn so that a row being edited can still see its own currently-selected instrument in the dropdown.

      Identifies the "Risk-free rate" assetclass by the English subcategory label rather than by id (since the id varies across installations).

      Named query: RiskFreeRateMapping.findAllRiskFreeInstruments (defined in META-INF/jpa-named-queries.properties). Returned columns are aliased to match the RiskFreeInstrumentOption projection: idSecuritycurrency, name, currency, urlHistoryExtend.

      Returns:
      one option per risk-free Security, ordered by currency then name

    • findCurrencyByIdSecuritycurrency

      @Query(nativeQuery=true, value="SELECT s.currency FROM security s WHERE s.id_securitycurrency = ?1") String findCurrencyByIdSecuritycurrency(Integer idSecuritycurrency)
      Returns the ISO currency code of the Security identified by idSecuritycurrency, or null if no such row exists. Used by the REST resource to validate that the currency of a posted mapping matches the underlying security's currency before persisting.
